scenes.heading: Spatial Annotation
scenes.subheading: Point at the deck, not the prose
scenes.narration: Annotation now works on any rendered artifact — png, mp4, rrweb, html, and slidey decks.

elements.text: Point at the deck, not the prose

scenes.heading: One anchor union
scenes.narration: A single AnnotationAnchor union ties operator feedback to an exact place in the artifact.

elements.text: semantic_element — a named element in the deck
region — a drawn box on the frame

scenes.heading: Annotate then refine
scenes.narration: The anchored note flows into a refine pass that edits the exact scene element it points at.
